function.name: run_security_audit
function.description: Run a comprehensive security audit on an AI Skill repository (local path or GitHub URL) to detect malicious code, prompt injections, and dangerous tool configurations.

target_url.description: The GitHub URL of the skill repository to audit (e.g., https://github.com/owner/repo). Provide this OR target_path.

target_path.description: The local file path of the skill repository to audit. Provide this OR target_url.

no_llm.description: If true, only perform static analysis (faster). If false, use Semantic LLM cross-validation for deep analysis (Requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY). Default to false if not specified.
